utterance: tag and push the new version

assertions.text: the agent should read .agents/skills/releasing-marketplace/SKILL.md to confirm the canonical tag/push sequence
the agent should create an annotated tag (git tag -a, not lightweight) with a release message summarizing the changes
the tag message should match the latest CHANGELOG.md entry (top entry) verbatim or with minor summary edits — not a fresh improvisation
after the run, git ls-remote --tags origin should show the new tag
the agent should not use --force or --force-with-lease to push tags; if the tag already exists, it should refuse and ask for confirmation rather than overwrite

reference_solution: Agent reads releasing-marketplace/SKILL.md, verifies CHANGELOG top entry matches planned tag message, creates annotated tag with `git tag -a v0.0.2 -m '...'`, pushes with `git push origin v0.0.2`, confirms via `git ls-remote --tags origin`.
